# AGENTS.md

## What This Repo Is

This is a **Hexo-generated deployment repository** for \leaout.github.io\ (GitHub Pages). It contains only the generated static output (HTML, CSS, JS) — not the Hexo source.

**Do not edit HTML files directly.** They are generated by Hexo and will be overwritten on the next deploy.

## Repo Structure

- \index.html\, \bout/\, \rchives/\, \	ags/\, \2024/\ — generated blog pages
- \css/\, \js/\, \onts/\, \img/\, \images/\, \ancybox/\ — static assets (theme + generated)
- No \package.json\, \_config.yml\, or \source/\ directory — the Hexo source lives elsewhere

## Key Facts

- Generated with **Hexo 7.0.0**
- Author: chenliangyu / leaout
- Single branch: \main\ (deployed directly)
- Commit message convention: \Site updated: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss\
- Blog content is in Chinese; covers databases, C/C++, OpenMP, Hexo setup, and system tooling

## Making Changes

Content changes must be made in the **Hexo source repository**, then regenerated and committed here. This repo is not the right place to edit blog posts, add pages, or modify the theme.

If you must make an emergency fix to a generated file (e.g., a typo in a published post), edit the HTML directly and commit with the standard \Site updated:\ message. Be aware the fix will be overwritten on the next full deploy.

## No Build/Test Commands

There are no build, lint, test, or typecheck commands in this repository. It is purely static output.

## SEO & Site Maintenance

The following files are manually maintained (not generated by Hexo):

- \obots.txt\ — allows all crawlers, points to sitemap
- \sitemap.xml\ — lists all 20 pages with lastmod and priority

## Hexo Source

The Hexo source project is located at \E:\pro\blog\ (not in this repo).

To regenerate the site:
1. \cd E:\pro\blog\
2. Edit posts in \source/_posts/\ (Markdown)
3. Run \
px hexo generate\ to generate static files to \public/\
4. Copy \public/*\ to this repo and commit

## Recent Optimizations

- Added \obots.txt\ and \sitemap.xml\ for search engine discovery
- Fixed all canonical URLs from \http://example.com\ to \https://leaout.github.io\
- Fixed Open Graph locale from \en_US\ to \zh_CN\
- Fixed theme URL in footer (\https:///imzl.com\ -> \https://imzl.com\)
- Added JSON-LD structured data (BlogPosting for articles, WebSite for homepage, WebPage for other pages)
- Expanded About page with richer bio content
- Rebuilt Hexo source from scratch at \E:\pro\blog\ with custom ZenMind theme
- Converted all 9 blog posts from HTML back to Markdown
- Removed unused assets: fancybox, jquery, scrollreveal, boxicons, local fonts (~270KB savings)
